Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle. New: a Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker) showing the next ST + AoE action and burst state for your job, plus a controller cross-hotbar (WXHB) selection mirror.
Changelog: v1.0.6.0: add Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker) for live ST/AoE next action + burst state, and a controller cross-hotbar (WXHB) selection mirror on press. v1.0.5.3: /tweak slash for silent master toggle.
